title: Humour as an innovative method for enhancing Students' motivation to learn foreign languages
description: Currently, the abundance of different technology, foreign language teaching applications, and diverse teaching approaches creates favorable conditions for learning a foreign language. In the process of foreign language acquisition, motivation plays a crucial role; one of the ways to motivate students during class and to sustain this motivation is by employing humor. This article discusses the theoretical basis of how humor can be used as a tool to motivate students and provides several practical examples.
